skills.name: frontend-profile-selector

skills.name: requirement-to-test-trace-compiler

skills.name: unit-test-generator

skills.name: integration-test-generator

skills.name: api-contract-test-generator

skills.name: database-migration-test-generator

skills.name: e2e-journey-test-generator

skills.name: property-based-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates property-based and generative tests for invariants, parsers, transformations, state machines, and contracts.

skills.name: mutation-test-planner

skills.name: performance-test-generator
skills.summary: Generates load, stress, endurance, concurrency, backpressure, and capacity tests from measurable quality scenarios.

skills.name: security-test-generator

skills.name: accessibility-test-generator

skills.name: test-data-and-fixture-factory

skills.name: isolated-build-runner

skills.name: dependency-resolution-diagnoser
skills.summary: Diagnoses package, repository, lockfile, version, platform, and provenance resolution failures.

skills.name: compile-error-classifier

skills.name: test-failure-classifier
skills.summary: Classifies assertion, fixture, environment, contract, timing, isolation, product, and flaky test failures.

skills.name: runtime-log-trace-diagnoser

skills.name: application-startup-probe

skills.name: smoke-and-health-verifier

skills.name: automated-patch-planner

skills.name: bounded-repair-loop

skills.name: flaky-test-detector

skills.name: cross-environment-matrix-validator

skills.name: build-green-evidence-publisher

skills.name: ci-pipeline-generator
